violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (cutting boards, and meat grinder) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2025

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the two door prep unit. The top of the chest freezer in the kitchen was observed in poor condition. Equipment must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the establishment have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2025
The ceiling tiles in the dining room area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2025

Wood is used in the construction of prep unit in the kitchen area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024
The ceiling tiles in the establishment were observed with water damage. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by tools. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils meat grinder, knives, can opener were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

Fried rice was observed held at 100 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Rice was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of battered chicken was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024
Knives and utensils were observed stored on unclean surfaces in the kitchen, between the equipment and on unclean nonfood contact surfaces. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

The rice cooker and rice warmer was not in good repair. Equipment must be kept in good repair. The top of the chest freezer in the kitchen was observed in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. The gasket on the prep unit was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2024

Wood is used in the construction of prep unit in the kitchen area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the cooking line, the rice cooker, the rice warmer, and under, behind, and underneath equipment have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024
The 3 bay sink drainage was observed leaking into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

The chest freezer refrigeration unit was observed with an excess of ice build up. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Corrective Action - Establishment must defrost unit. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024
The ceiling tiles in the establishment were observed with water damage. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2024
The hood system was observed with an excessive amount of food debris. The hood system must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024
